Case Study 02

Luna & Sage Studio

Beauty and wellness website concept designed with calm editorial layouts, warm neutrals, elegant typography, and a refined booking experience.

Brand IdentityUI DesignFront-End DevelopmentResponsive Design

Challenge

Create a beauty and wellness brand concept that feels elevated, calm, and easy to navigate while clearly presenting services, pricing, approach, and booking.

Solution

I used spacious editorial layouts, soft neutral colors, refined serif typography, and a simplified booking form to create a luxurious but approachable digital experience.

Role

Brand direction, UI design, front-end development, layout system, visual hierarchy, and responsive page design.

Project Screens

A minimal wellness brand with softness and clarity.

“Less noise. More intention.”

The visual system was designed to feel calm, refined, and easy for visitors to move through.
